expectations.evidence: resource_directory.views.inc: $data['resource_links']['table']['group'] = t('Resource Directory'). Group key present.

expectations.text: Custom filter plugin placed in src/Plugin/views/filter/ directory
expectations.evidence: CategoryFilter.php placed at src/Plugin/views/filter/CategoryFilter.php -- correct PSR-4 path for Views filter plugins.
CategoryFilter extends InOperator (more specialized than FilterPluginBase, provides built-in multi-select dropdown).

expectations.text: hook_views_data() includes correct field definitions with title and help text
expectations.evidence: All 5 fields (id, title, url, category, created) have 'title' and 'help' text. Each has appropriate field/filter/sort handlers (numeric, standard, string, date).

resource_directory.install: hook_schema() defines resource_links with id (serial), title (varchar 255), url (varchar 2048), category (varchar 128), created (int). Primary key on id, index on category.

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en resource_directory returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Module confirmed enabled via ddev drush pm:list --status=enabled showing (resource_directory).

expectations.text: E2E: Views integration registered -- Views admin accessible
expectations.evidence: Module enabled with drupal:views dependency. Views admin at /admin/structure/views accessible. Resource Directory data available for new views.

claims.evidence: resource_directory.views.inc contains hook_views_data() -- Drupal only loads this when Views needs it.

claims.claim: Uses D11 #[ViewsFilter] attribute instead of annotation
claims.evidence: CategoryFilter.php uses #[ViewsFilter('resource_directory_category')] PHP attribute with use Drupal\views\Attribute\ViewsFilter.

claims.claim: Includes config schema for custom filter

suggestions: Add expectation for .views.inc file separation (skill teaches this pattern)
Add expectation for D11 attribute syntax
eval_feedback.overall: All 7 expectations pass. With-skill output shows skill-guided patterns: .views.inc lazy loading, D11 attribute, InOperator base class, config schema.
